p.strong: Target: 10,000+ concurrent connections with stable p99 latency
p.em: Implementation Spec: io_uring multishot accept + provided buffer rings

ul.li: Fields: fd (4B), state (4B), rx_bytes (8B), tx_bytes (8B), timestamp (8B), buffer_id (4B)
Access: O(1) indexed by internal connection ID
Zero-Copy: No user-space copy for syscall
Cleanup: Return buffer to pool after completion
